add_member.title: Add member
add_member.description: Avatars (emoji or photo) are set from the chores card editor after a member is added.

edit_member.title: Edit member
edit_member.description: To change the avatar, edit the chores card on your dashboard.

remove_member.title: Remove member
remove_member.description: Type the member's name to confirm removal.

rename_confirm.title: Confirm member rename
rename_confirm.description:
Renaming '{old_name}' to '{new_name}' will change the entity slug.

Downstream impact:
{impact}

Check the box to proceed.

edit_round_trip.title: Apple Reminders sync
edit_round_trip.description: When enabled, completing an Apple Reminders item fires an event so a bridge can mark it done in Reminders too.

data.generate_secret: Generate a new random secret on submit

edit_templates.title: Routine presets
edit_templates.description: A preset is a reusable bundle of routines (e.g. "School-age kid") that can be applied to a member when they're created. Add a custom preset to define your own.

menu_options.manage_existing_preset: Edit or delete a custom preset

view_builtin_presets.title: Built-in routine presets
view_builtin_presets.description:
These presets ship with the integration and can't be edited or removed:

{presets}

rename_custom_preset.title: Rename custom preset
rename_custom_preset.description:
Renaming **{preset_name}**.

Choose a new display name. Member references to this preset keep working — the internal identifier doesn't change.

delete_preset_confirm.title: Delete custom preset

add_preset_routine.title: Add a routine to this preset
add_preset_routine.description:
Repeats uses a constrained RRULE subset. Examples:
- Daily: `FREQ=DAILY`
- Every other day: `FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=2`
- Weekly on Mon/Wed/Fri: `FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE,FR`
- 15th of the month: `FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=15`
- First Saturday every 6 months: `FREQ=MONTHLY;BYDAY=1SA;INTERVAL=6`
- April 1st every year: `FREQ=YEARLY;BYMONTH=4;BYMONTHDAY=1`

RRULE background: https://dateutil.readthedocs.io/en/stable/rrule.html

data.add_another: Add another routine to this preset

error.name_too_long: Name must be 50 characters or fewer.
error.invalid_color: Color must be a valid hex color (e.g. #f5c89c).
error.slug_conflict: A member or preset with an equivalent name already exists.
error.empty_slug: The name produces an empty identifier. Use letters or numbers.
error.confirm_mismatch: Name does not match. Removal cancelled.
error.invalid_time: Time must be in HH:MM format (e.g. 04:00).
error.entity_rename_failed: Failed to rename the member's entities. Check the logs and try again.
error.entity_create_failed: Failed to create the member's entities. Check the logs and try again.
error.entity_delete_failed: Failed to delete the member's entities. Check the logs and try again.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://
error.secret_too_short: Secret must be at least 32 characters.
error.invalid_rrule: Not a valid recurrence rule. Example: FREQ=DAILY or FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO
